title: Crispy Tofu Noodle Bowl
description: A quick and delicious Vietnamese-inspired dish featuring crispy tofu and fresh noodles.

ingredients.name: tofu
ingredients.notes: extra-firm, drained and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: 1. In a shallow dish, mix together panko breadcrumbs and a pinch of salt.
2. Dip each piece of tofu into the breadcrumb mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
3. Heat 1/2 inch of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Fry the breaded tofu pieces until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
5. Remove the tofu from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
6. Cook the noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
7. In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, crispy tofu, and chopped green onions and cilantro.
8. In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce and lime juice. Pour the sauce over the noodle mixture and toss to combine.
